About

Us

A new company with real trade experience behind every detail.

Hailite Xteriors is a new exterior company built on years of hands-on experience in siding, soffit, fascia, cladding, Hardie Board and roofing support. We may be new as a company, but the workmanship, jobsite discipline and exterior knowledge behind the name come from real field experience. Our goal is simple: protect your home, make it look sharp, and build exteriors that can stand up to Alberta weather.

Tips &

Updates

After Hail Quick exterior check after a storm

Walk around the home and look for cracked siding, loose fascia, dented metal, damaged vents, missing shingles and water entry points. Small damage is easier to repair before it spreads.

Siding Care Keeping siding clean and sharp

Rinse dust and dirt with low pressure, keep BBQ heat away from vinyl, trim branches touching the wall, and check corners and trims after strong wind or hail.

Exterior Maintenance Protecting soffit, fascia and cladding

Keep gutters clear, watch for sagging fascia, confirm soffit vents stay open, and inspect panel joints. Good water management protects the whole exterior system.

Material Choice Choosing the right finish

Vinyl is budget-friendly, Hardie gives a stronger premium look, cladding creates modern architectural accents, and roofing upgrades should match Alberta wind and hail exposure.
